featureType.name: preprint_pestovany
featureType.title: preprint_pestovany
featureType.nativeCRS: GEOGCS["WGS 84", DATUM["World Geodetic System 1984", SPHEROID["WGS 84", 6378137.0, 298.257223563, AUTHORITY["EPSG","7030"]], AUTHORITY["EPSG","6326"]], PRIMEM["Greenwich", 0.0, AUTHORITY["EPSG","8901"]], UNIT["degree", 0.017453292519943295], AXIS["Geodetic longitude", EAST], AXIS["Geodetic latitude", NORTH], AUTHORITY["EPSG","4326"]]

virtualTable.name: preprint_pestovany
virtualTable.sql: SELECT q.code AS quadrant_name, ST_Union(q.centroid_wgs) AS centroid FROM atlas.records as r JOIN geodata.quadrants_full q ON ST_Within(r.coords_wgs, q.geom_wgs) WHERE r.taxon_id = %TAXON_ID% AND (r.validation_status=3 OR r.validation_status=1) AND r.originality_id=2 AND r.include_in_map = true GROUP BY q.code
